item104.name: greater health potion
item104.More information:: You can buy them from the [entity id=entity1 name='Gear Merchant'] in both [location id=location1 name='Town 1'] and [location id=location2 name='Town 2'], the potion regenerates 200 to 300 [ui id=ui1 name='HP'].

item105.name: super health potion
item105.More information:: You can buy them from the [entity id=entity1 name='Gear Merchant'] in both [location id=location1 name='Town 1'] and [location id=location2 name='Town 2'], the potion regenerates 200 to 300 [ui id=ui2 name='MP'].
